invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（近期低点）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.095（近期低点附近）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.095 (near recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破580（低于近期低点）或融资费率转正超过0.001%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 580 (below recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.001% (short pressure easing).
